members.name: Clear
members.summary: Removes the entire contents of the config.

members.name: EncodeToText
members.summary: Obtain the text version of this config file (the same text that would be written to a file).

members.name: EraseSection
members.summary: Deletes the specified section along with all the key-value pairs inside. Raises an error if the section does not exist.

members.name: EraseSectionKey
members.signature: public void EraseSectionKey(String section, String key)
members.summary: Deletes the specified key in a section. Raises an error if either the section or the key do not exist.

members.name: GetSectionKeys
members.summary: Returns an array of all defined key identifiers in the specified section. Raises an error and returns an empty array if the section does not exist.

members.name: GetSections
members.summary: Returns an array of all defined section identifiers.

members.name: GetValue
members.signature: public Variant GetValue(String section, String key, Variant @default)
members.summary: Returns the current value for the specified section and key. If either the section or the key do not exist, the method returns the fallback [param default] value. If [param default] is not specified or set to [code]null[/code], an error is also raised.

members.name: HasSection
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the specified section exists.

members.name: HasSectionKey
members.signature: public bool HasSectionKey(String section, String key)
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the specified section-key pair exists.

members.name: Load
members.summary: Loads the config file specified as a parameter. The file's contents are parsed and loaded in the [ConfigFile] object which the method was called on. Returns [constant OK] on success, or one of the other [enum Error] values if the operation failed.

members.name: LoadEncrypted
members.signature: public int LoadEncrypted(String path, PackedByteArray key)
members.summary: Loads the encrypted config file specified as a parameter, using the provided [param key] to decrypt it. The file's contents are parsed and loaded in the [ConfigFile] object which the method was called on. Returns [constant OK] on success, or one of the other [enum Error] values if the operation failed.

members.name: LoadEncryptedPass
members.signature: public int LoadEncryptedPass(String path, String password)
members.summary: Loads the encrypted config file specified as a parameter, using the provided [param password] to decrypt it. The file's contents are parsed and loaded in the [ConfigFile] object which the method was called on. Returns [constant OK] on success, or one of the other [enum Error] values if the operation failed.

members.name: Parse
members.summary: Parses the passed string as the contents of a config file. The string is parsed and loaded in the ConfigFile object which the method was called on. Returns [constant OK] on success, or one of the other [enum Error] values if the operation failed.

members.name: Save
members.summary: Saves the contents of the [ConfigFile] object to the file specified as a parameter. The output file uses an INI-style structure. Returns [constant OK] on success, or one of the other [enum Error] values if the operation failed.

members.name: SaveEncrypted
members.signature: public int SaveEncrypted(String path, PackedByteArray key)
members.summary: Saves the contents of the [ConfigFile] object to the AES-256 encrypted file specified as a parameter, using the provided [param key] to encrypt it. The output file uses an INI-style structure. Returns [constant OK] on success, or one of the other [enum Error] values if the operation failed.

members.name: SaveEncryptedPass
members.signature: public int SaveEncryptedPass(String path, String password)
members.summary: Saves the contents of the [ConfigFile] object to the AES-256 encrypted file specified as a parameter, using the provided [param password] to encrypt it. The output file uses an INI-style structure. Returns [constant OK] on success, or one of the other [enum Error] values if the operation failed.

members.name: SetValue
members.signature: public void SetValue(String section, String key, Variant value)
members.summary: Assigns a value to the specified key of the specified section. If either the section or the key do not exist, they are created. Passing a [code]null[/code] value deletes the specified key if it exists, and deletes the section if it ends up empty once the key has been removed.
